home.quickActionsHint: Common tasks from the home page so you don't have to dig into settings.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Switch between light and dark, or pick an accent color.

feature.title: App Launcher
feature.subtitle: Summon a command palette from anywhere to launch installed apps.
feature.aboutBody: Press the global shortcut to open a search box. Installed apps are indexed automatically.

feature.title: Floating Ball
feature.subtitle: Keep a small launcher control on the desktop and open radial shortcuts around it.
feature.aboutBody: Enable it in Settings to show the desktop ball. Click the ball to open its radial menu, or right-click it to close it.

settings.title: Floating Ball
settings.subtitle: Show a desktop shortcut ball and choose which tools appear in its radial menu.
settings.enableHint: Disabled by default at startup until you turn it on here.
settings.menuFeaturesHint: Choose up to 6 tools. The floating ball itself is not a menu tool.

settings.title: Launcher
settings.subtitle: Summon the command palette from anywhere with a global shortcut.
settings.hotkeyHint: Focus the field and press a key combination, or type Electron accelerator syntax manually. Occupied shortcuts cannot be captured; use an available combination or type it manually.
settings.invalid: Could not register that combination. The previous shortcut is still active.
